title: 3D Gaussian Splatting end-to-end lineage explainer
summary: Walked the 3D Gaussian Splatting dependency graph from the Kerbl 2023 anchor in both directions. Read NeRF as the only upstream prerequisite, then six direct extensions (SuGaR, 2DGS, Scaffold-GS, MonoGS, 4DGS, gsplat math supplement) plus the Bulo revision paper. Returned a lineage explainer organised by geometry / structure / SLAM / dynamic branches. Clean happy-path session — no stumbles.
